title: BasicShowItem
description: A simple plugin that lets you show your held item in chat.
body:
BasicShowItem is a simple plugin that lets you show your held item to all other players.

You can show your held item by simply adding `[i]` or `[item]` to your message, or using the `/showitem` command.

This plugin has a single permission: `basicshowitem.use`, and it is set to `true` by default.
